manifests.contents:
[workspace]
members = ["src/*"]
default-members = ["src/*"]
resolver = "2"

[workspace.dependencies.argon2]
version = "0.5.3"
features = ["alloc", "rand"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.arrayvec]
version = "0.7.4"
features = ["serde"]

[workspace.dependencies.async-channel]
version = "2.3.1"

[workspace.dependencies.async-trait]
version = "0.1.83"

[workspace.dependencies.axum]
version = "0.7.9"
features = ["form", "http1", "http2", "json", "matched-path", "tokio", "tracing"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.axum-client-ip]
version = "0.6.1"

[workspace.dependencies.axum-extra]
version = "0.9.6"
features = ["typed-header", "tracing"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.axum-server]
version = "0.7.1"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.axum-server-dual-protocol]
version = "0.7"

[workspace.dependencies.base64]
version = "0.22.1"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.blurhash]
version = "0.2.3"
features = ["fast-linear-to-srgb", "image"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.bytes]
version = "1.9.0"

[workspace.dependencies.bytesize]
version = "1.3.0"

[workspace.dependencies.cargo_toml]
version = "0.21"
features = ["features"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.checked_ops]
version = "0.1"

[workspace.dependencies.chrono]
version = "0.4.38"
features = ["alloc", "std"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.clap]
version = "4.5.23"
features = ["derive", "env", "error-context", "help", "std", "string", "usage"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.conduwuit-admin]
path = "src/admin"
default-features = false
package = "conduwuit_admin"

[workspace.dependencies.conduwuit-api]
path = "src/api"
default-features = false
package = "conduwuit_api"

[workspace.dependencies.conduwuit-core]
path = "src/core"
default-features = false
package = "conduwuit_core"

[workspace.dependencies.conduwuit-database]
path = "src/database"
default-features = false
package = "conduwuit_database"

[workspace.dependencies.conduwuit-macros]
path = "src/macros"
default-features = false
package = "conduwuit_macros"

[workspace.dependencies.conduwuit-router]
path = "src/router"
default-features = false
package = "conduwuit_router"

[workspace.dependencies.conduwuit-service]
path = "src/service"
default-features = false
package = "conduwuit_service"

[workspace.dependencies.console-subscriber]
version = "0.4"

[workspace.dependencies.const-str]
version = "0.5.7"

[workspace.dependencies.core_affinity]
version = "0.8.1"

[workspace.dependencies.ctor]
version = "0.2.9"

[workspace.dependencies.cyborgtime]
version = "2.1.1"

[workspace.dependencies.either]
version = "1.13.0"
features = ["serde"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.figment]
version = "0.10.19"
features = ["env", "toml"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.futures]
version = "0.3.30"
features = ["std", "async-await"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.hardened_malloc-rs]
version = "0.1.2"
features = ["static", "gcc", "light"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.hickory-resolver]
version = "0.24.2"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.hmac]
version = "0.12.1"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.http]
version = "1.2.0"

[workspace.dependencies.http-body-util]
version = "0.1.2"

[workspace.dependencies.hyper]
version = "1.5.1"
features = ["server", "http1", "http2"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.hyper-util]
version = "=0.1.8"
features = ["server-auto", "server-graceful", "tokio"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.image]
version = "0.25.5"
features = ["jpeg", "png", "gif", "webp"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.ipaddress]
version = "0.1.3"

[workspace.dependencies.itertools]
version = "0.13.0"

[workspace.dependencies.libc]
version = "0.2"

[workspace.dependencies.libloading]
version = "0.8.6"

[workspace.dependencies.log]
version = "0.4.22"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.loole]
version = "0.4.0"

[workspace.dependencies.lru-cache]
version = "0.1.2"

[workspace.dependencies.maplit]
version = "1.0.2"

[workspace.dependencies.minicbor]
version = "0.25.1"
features = ["std"]

[workspace.dependencies.minicbor-serde]
version = "0.3.2"
features = ["std"]

[workspace.dependencies.nix]
version = "0.29.0"
features = ["resource"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.num-traits]
version = "0.2"

[workspace.dependencies.opentelemetry]
version = "0.21.0"

[workspace.dependencies.opentelemetry-jaeger]
version = "0.20.0"
features = ["rt-tokio"]

[workspace.dependencies.opentelemetry_sdk]
version = "0.21.2"
features = ["rt-tokio"]

[workspace.dependencies.proc-macro2]
version = "1.0.89"

[workspace.dependencies.quote]
version = "1.0.37"

[workspace.dependencies.rand]
version = "0.8.5"

[workspace.dependencies.regex]
version = "1.11.1"

[workspace.dependencies.reqwest]
version = "0.12.9"
features = ["rustls-tls-native-roots", "socks", "hickory-dns", "http2"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.ring]
version = "0.17.8"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.ruma]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/ruwuma"
rev = "5dc3e0f81d614ed9dc96b50f646b2e4385291c55"
features = ["compat", "rand", "appservice-api-c", "client-api", "federation-api", "markdown", "push-gateway-api-c", "server-util", "unstable-exhaustive-types", "ring-compat", "compat-upload-signatures", "identifiers-validation", "unstable-unspecified", "unstable-msc2448", "unstable-msc2666", "unstable-msc2867", "unstable-msc2870", "unstable-msc3026", "unstable-msc3061", "unstable-msc3245", "unstable-msc3266", "unstable-msc3381", "unstable-msc3489", "unstable-msc3575", "unstable-msc4075", "unstable-msc4121", "unstable-msc4125", "unstable-msc4186", "unstable-msc4203", "unstable-msc4210", "unstable-extensible-events", "unstable-pdu"]

[workspace.dependencies.rust-rocksdb]
path = "deps/rust-rocksdb"
features = ["multi-threaded-cf", "mt_static", "lz4", "zstd", "zlib", "bzip2"]
package = "rust-rocksdb-uwu"

[workspace.dependencies.rustls]
version = "0.23.19"
features = ["aws_lc_rs"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.rustyline-async]
version = "0.4.3"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.sanitize-filename]
version = "0.6.0"

[workspace.dependencies.sd-notify]
version = "0.4.3"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.sentry]
version = "0.35.0"
features = ["backtrace", "contexts", "debug-images", "panic", "rustls", "tower", "tower-http", "tracing", "reqwest", "log"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.sentry-tower]
version = "0.35.0"

[workspace.dependencies.sentry-tracing]
version = "0.35.0"

[workspace.dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0.216"
features = ["rc"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.serde_html_form]
version = "0.2.6"

[workspace.dependencies.serde_json]
version = "1.0.133"
features = ["raw_value"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.serde_regex]
version = "1.1.0"

[workspace.dependencies.serde_yaml]
version = "0.9.34"

[workspace.dependencies.sha1]
version = "0.10.6"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.sha2]
version = "0.10.8"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.smallstr]
version = "0.3"
features = ["ffi", "std", "union"]

[workspace.dependencies.smallvec]
version = "1.13.2"
features = ["const_generics", "const_new", "serde", "union", "write"]

[workspace.dependencies.syn]
version = "2.0.90"
features = ["full", "extra-traits"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.termimad]
version = "0.31.1"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.thiserror]
version = "2.0.7"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.tikv-jemalloc-ctl]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/jemallocator"
rev = "82af58d6a13ddd5dcdc7d4e91eae3b63292995b8"
features = ["use_std"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.tikv-jemalloc-sys]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/jemallocator"
rev = "82af58d6a13ddd5dcdc7d4e91eae3b63292995b8"
features = ["background_threads_runtime_support", "unprefixed_malloc_on_supported_platforms"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.tikv-jemallocator]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/jemallocator"
rev = "82af58d6a13ddd5dcdc7d4e91eae3b63292995b8"
features = ["background_threads_runtime_support", "unprefixed_malloc_on_supported_platforms"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.42.0"
features = ["fs", "net", "macros", "sync", "signal", "time", "rt-multi-thread", "io-util", "tracing"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.tokio-metrics]
version = "0.4.0"

[workspace.dependencies.toml]
version = "0.8.14"
features = ["parse"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.tower]
version = "0.5.1"
features = ["util"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.tower-http]
version = "0.6.2"
features = ["add-extension", "catch-panic", "cors", "sensitive-headers", "set-header", "timeout", "trace", "util"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.tracing]
version = "0.1.41"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.tracing-core]
version = "0.1.33"
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.tracing-flame]
version = "0.2.0"

[workspace.dependencies.tracing-opentelemetry]
version = "0.22.0"

[workspace.dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
version = "=0.3.18"
features = ["env-filter", "std", "tracing", "tracing-log", "ansi", "fmt"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.url]
version = "2.5.4"
features = ["serde"]
default-features = false

[workspace.dependencies.webpage]
version = "2.0.1"
default-features = false

[workspace.package]
edition = "2024"
version = "0.0.1"
authors = ["June Clementine Strawberry <june@girlboss.ceo>", "strawberry <strawberry@puppygock.gay>", "Jason Volk <jason@zemos.net>"]
description = "a very cool Matrix chat homeserver written in Rust"
homepage = "https://conduwuit.puppyirl.gay/"
readme = "README.md"
keywords = ["chat", "matrix", "networking", "server", "uwu"]
categories = ["network-programming"]
license = "Apache-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/conduwuit"
rust-version = "1.85.0"

[workspace.metadata.crane]
name = "conduwuit"

[patch.crates-io.async-channel]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/async-channel"
rev = "92e5e74063bf2a3b10414bcc8a0d68b235644280"

[patch.crates-io.core_affinity]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/core_affinity_rs"
rev = "9c8e51510c35077df888ee72a36b4b05637147da"

[patch.crates-io.event-listener]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/event-listener"
rev = "fe4aebeeaae435af60087ddd56b573a2e0be671d"

[patch.crates-io.rustyline-async]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/rustyline-async"
rev = "deaeb0694e2083f53d363b648da06e10fc13900c"

[patch.crates-io.tracing]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/tracing"
rev = "05825066a6d0e9ad6b80dcf29457eb179ff4768c"

[patch.crates-io.tracing-core]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/tracing"
rev = "05825066a6d0e9ad6b80dcf29457eb179ff4768c"

[patch.crates-io.tracing-log]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/tracing"
rev = "05825066a6d0e9ad6b80dcf29457eb179ff4768c"

[patch.crates-io.tracing-subscriber]
git = "https://github.com/girlbossceo/tracing"
rev = "05825066a6d0e9ad6b80dcf29457eb179ff4768c"

[profile.release]
lto = "thin"
strip = true

[profile.release.package]

[profile.dev]
opt-level = 0
debug = "full"
debug-assertions = true
panic = "unwind"
incremental = true

[profile.dev.package."*"]
inherits = "dev"
debug = "limited"
incremental = false
codegen-units = 1
opt-level = "z"

[profile.dev.package.conduwuit]
inherits = "dev"

[profile.dev.package.conduwuit_core]
inherits = "dev"
incremental = false

[profile.dev.package.rust-rocksdb-uwu]
inherits = "dev"
debug = "limited"
incremental = false
codegen-units = 1
opt-level = "z"

[profile.test]
opt-level = 0
inherits = "dev"
codegen-units = 16
incremental = false
strip = false

[profile.test.package."*"]
inherits = "dev"
debug = 0
strip = false
opt-level = 0
codegen-units = 16
incremental = false

[profile.bench]
inherits = "release"

[profile.bench.package]

[profile.release-debuginfo]
debug = "full"
inherits = "release"
strip = false

[profile.release-debuginfo.package]

[profile.release-high-perf]
inherits = "release"
lto = "fat"
codegen-units = 1
panic = "abort"

[profile.release-high-perf.package]

[profile.release-max-perf]
inherits = "release"
lto = "fat"
strip = true

[profile.release-max-perf.package.conduwuit_macros]
inherits = "release-max-perf.build-override"

[profile.release-max-perf.build-override]
inherits = "release-max-perf"
opt-level = 0
codegen-units = 32

plugin = false

edition = "2021"
required-features = []
crate-type = ["rlib"]

# This is the authoritiative configuration of this project's Rust toolchain.
#
# Other files that need upkeep when this changes:
#
# * `Cargo.toml`
# * `flake.nix`
#
# Search in those files for `rust-toolchain.toml` to find the relevant places.
# If you're having trouble making the relevant changes, bug a maintainer.

[toolchain]
channel = "1.85.0"
profile = "minimal"
components = [
    # For rust-analyzer
    "rust-src",
    "rust-analyzer",
    # For CI and editors
    "rustfmt",
    "clippy",
]
targets = [
    #"x86_64-apple-darwin",
    "x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu",
    "x86_64-unknown-linux-musl",
    "aarch64-unknown-linux-musl",
    #"aarch64-apple-darwin",
]
